subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God, O maidservant of Bahá, His Holiness the martyr, son of the martyr, hath made mention of thee in his letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ای کنیز بهاء حضرت شهید ابن شهید ذکر شما را در ذریعه خویش نمودند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant
